title: ochradenus aucheri subsp. ochradeni
intro: Ochradenus aucheri subsp. ochradeni, also known as Persian toad flax or Persian toadflax, is a plant species within the family Resedaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine for the treatment of various health issues. It is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to create infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are believed to possess antioxidant and expectorant properties.
